message:
feat(freeze): add async function support with Promise.resolve wrapping

- Add promiseResolve to JSValue for wrapping async function returns
- Modify return_async opcode to wrap values in Promise.resolve()
- Add registerCpoolBytecode for closure bytecode registration
- Add js_get_function_bytecode_ptr FFI for extracting bytecode pointers
- Add test case for async arrow functions and closures

Note: Anonymous closures returned from async functions don't yet dispatch
to frozen code. They fall back to QuickJS bytecode interpretation.
Bytecode registration at closure creation time is needed to fix this.
